title: T-039 — UI: PLN-015 Add PO Line modal (parity with add_po_line_modal)
prompt:
Build PLN-015 Add PO Line modal at `src/components/planning/po/AddPOLineModal.tsx` matching prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning/modals.jsx:182-225` 1:1.

Fields: product (combobox with server search), qty, uom (read-only auto-filled from product), unit_price (auto-filled from supplier_products), discount, expected_delivery_date. Computed line_total visible (derived).

Zod schema enforces qty > 0 (V-PLAN-PO-004). Submit invokes Server Action that POSTs po_line.

RED RTL test asserts qty=0 rejected, product select autofills uom + unit_price, line_total derives.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add PO Line modal with product combobox, autofill, derived line_total.
pipeline_inputs.details: Prototype reference: planning/modals.jsx:182-225. Translation notes: useState form → useForm with zodResolver; uom read-only autofilled from product; unit_price from supplier_products lookup; line_total derived; product options via Server Action search; labels via next-intl planning.po.line. Parity checklist: (1) field order (product, qty, uom, unit_price, discount, expected_delivery, total), (2) qty validation message text, (3) Cancel/Save footer.
acceptance_criteria: Given the modal opens, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning/modals.jsx:182-225`, then it shows the same 7 fields in the same order, the same uom read-only behavior, and the same Cancel/Save footer — parity verified by RTL test.
Given qty=0 input, when Save is clicked, then Zod rejects with message matching V-PLAN-PO-004 and no API call is made.
Given a product with supplier_products.unit_price=4.20, when selected, then unit_price field shows 4.20 and is read-only by default.

Given `pnpm vitest run src/components/planning/po/__tests__/AddPOLineModal.test.tsx`, when run, then 0 failures. Given the UI task is closed, then CLOSEOUT includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states. Follow parity evidence requirements in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED RTL test for parity + qty=0 rejection + autofill + line_total derivation.
Playwright e2e: open modal, add line, expect new row in PO Detail lines table.
Run `pnpm vitest run` and `pnpm playwright test`.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow qty=0 to bypass validation.
Do not place line_total into form state — must derive.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Consumes optional D365 integration adapter metadata; D365 never unlocks factory use.

ui_closeout_evidence: Playwright trace artifact for each happy path and blocked/error path exercised by the task.
Desktop screenshots/artifacts for each implemented page/modal state compared against prototype line references.
Attach artifact paths in CLOSEOUT with changed files, test commands/results, and acceptance criteria status.
